description: The original proof gave a circular order estimate for the subgroup generated by the images of our generators. To address this, we need a concrete independent size estimate for H, for example via explicit orbit-stabilizer computation, or exclusion of all maximal subgroups for each p. Current algebraic argument covers only the exceptional, Borel, and Cartan normalizer cases, but does not provide a verified group order. Additional computation for explicit order or Schreier graph diameter per p is needed.
action_taken: The original proof gave a circular order estimate for the subgroup generated by the images of our generators.
